user.title: iPad MQTT Dashboard
user.description: Enter the device ID to onboard (a short name like 'kitchen_ipad'). A default profile with a clock will be created.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

abort.no_devices: No devices are onboarded yet. Open the app so it registers, or add a device in the integration's initial setup.

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Please fix the profile and try again.
error.overlaps: Overlapping widgets detected. Fix positions and submit again.
